<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by vue-docgen-cli — do not edit. Source: src/components/CnInfoWidget/CnInfoWidget.vue -->

### Props

| Name            | Type       | Required | Default | Description                                                                                                                |
| --------------- | ---------- | -------- | ------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fields`        | `union`    |          | `null`  | Manual field definitions. Array of `{ label, value }` objects. Takes precedence over object+schema auto-generation.        |
| `object`        | `object`   |          | `null`  | Object data for auto-generation mode. Properties are extracted based on the schema definition.                             |
| `schema`        | `object`   |          | `null`  | JSON Schema for auto-generation mode. Each schema property generates a label:value pair using the property title as label. |
| `columns`       | `number`   |          | `2`     | Number of columns for the grid layout.                                                                                     |
| `includeFields` | `string[]` |          | `null`  | Fields to include (by key). If provided, only these fields are shown. Only applies in auto-generation mode.                |
| `excludeFields` | `string[]` |          | `[]`    | Fields to exclude (by key). Only applies in auto-generation mode.                                                          |
